description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a modern urban appearance, featuring a long, open trench coat layered over a shirt and fitted pants. The coat is tailored and extends down to the ankles, with a visible split at the back for ease of movement. The figure has short, side-parted hair styled in a sleek, chin-length bob. The person is wearing casual sneakers, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The arms are extended horizontally, and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult figure in a long trench coat, fitted pants, and sneakers, with a sleek chin-length bob hairstyle and arms extended outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open trench coat, shirt, pants, sneakers, and the person's face partially covered by hair.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length and drape of the coat, the straight posture, and the profile of the bob hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back split of the coat, the fit of the pants, and the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coat's length, the arm's position, and the side profile of the head.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat over a shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
